error.pending_limit: You have too many posts or topics pending approval. Please wait until some are reviewed before creating new content.
error.flood_limit: You are posting too quickly. Please wait {minutes} minutes before posting again.

admin.description: Prevent topic/reply flooding and limit pending approvals.

settings.max_pending_help: Maximum number of posts and topics a user can have awaiting approval before being blocked from posting. Default: 6.
settings.flood_limit_help: Maximum number of new topics a user can create within the flood interval before being blocked. Default: 3. Note: Flarum already enforces a built-in 10-second cooldown between all posts and topics.
settings.post_flood_limit_help: Maximum number of new replies a user can post within the flood interval before being blocked. Set to 0 to disable (relies on Flarum's built-in 10-second throttle). Default: 0.
settings.flood_interval_minutes_help: Time window in minutes used to count recent topic or reply creations. Applies to both topic and reply flood limits. Default: 5.
settings.pending_limit_message_help: Override the default error message shown when a user hits the pending-posts limit. Leave empty to use the default.
settings.flood_limit_message_help: Override the default error message shown when a user posts too quickly. Leave empty to use the default. You can use {minutes} as a placeholder.
settings.pending_limit_message_suggestion: You have too many posts or topics pending approval. Please wait until some are reviewed before creating new content.
settings.flood_limit_message_suggestion: You are posting too quickly. Please wait {minutes} minutes before posting again.
